_publications._publicationTitle: Proximity biotinylation identifies a set of conformation-specific interactions between Merlin and cell junction proteins.

_contextSnippet: Cotransfection experiments in HEK 293T cells confirmed complex formation with Merlin for 7 of 10 proteins tested: Angiomotin α-actinin, afadin, ASPP2, Lats1, myosin IIB, Scrib, and ZO-1. Angiomotin interacted with the highest apparent affinity (~100-fold greater than the negative control)
details: Successfully used for cotransfection experiments to confirm complex formation with Merlin for 7 of 10 proteins tested, with Angiomotin showing ~100-fold greater interaction than negative control
